conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Hi, I'm calling from DeepData AI. We're a data processing solution that helps companies like yours streamline their data workflows and gain deeper insights. I came across your company, Sprig, and was impressed with the work you're doing in UX research. I think our solution could really help you optimize your data processing.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: Ah, yeah. We're always looking for ways to improve our workflows, but I'm not sure if we're in the market for a new data processing solution right now. What makes DeepData AI different from what we're currently using?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Well, our AI-powered engine can handle large volumes of data and provide real-time analytics, which can help you make more informed decisions. We've seen significant ROI with our other clients in the research industry. I'd love to schedule a demo to show you how it works.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: I'm not sure if now is the right time for a demo. We're in the middle of planning our upcoming Experience Research Summit, and our team is pretty busy. Plus, I'm concerned about the cost – we've had issues with budget overruns in the past. Can you tell me more about your pricing model?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Absolutely. Our pricing is tiered, based on the volume of data you're processing. We offer a free trial, and then our basic plan starts at $5,000 per month. We've found that our solution pays for itself in terms of the insights and efficiency it provides.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: That's a bit steeper than I was hoping for. We've also been looking at some other solutions, like Tableau and Power BI, which seem to offer similar functionality at a lower cost. And to be honest, I'm not sure if our team has the bandwidth to integrate a new solution right now – we've got a lot of other priorities.

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: I understand your concerns, but I think DeepData AI offers some unique advantages that would be worth exploring further. Would you be open to a quick call with our integration team to discuss how we can make the onboarding process as smooth as possible?

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: I appreciate the offer, but I think we're going to have to pass on DeepData AI for now. I need to prioritize our existing projects and discuss any new initiatives with our team. We'll have to decline your offer – we just don't have the resources or budget to move forward with a new data processing solution at this time.

analysis.raw:
Score: 2
Outcome: Failure
Key_Objection: Price
Feedback: The seller should have been more prepared to address the buyer's pricing concerns and provide a more tailored value proposition to overcome the objection. Sentiment: Neutral
